name: osint-dezinformacia-monitor
description: Continuous OSINT monitor that ingests feeds, normalizes text, detects misinformation via regex/ML, enriches with Wikidata, and prepares fact-checked replies.

steps.name: ingest-feeds
steps.prompt_template: Ingest recent data from the following OSINT sources: {{input}}. Use web_fetch and web_search to gather content, authors, and timestamps.

steps.name: translate-content
steps.prompt_template: Translate all non-English content in {{raw_data}} to English. Preserve original text alongside the translation. Source languages include Slovak (SK), Czech (CZ), and Hungarian (HU).

steps.name: normalize-content
steps.prompt_template: Normalize the raw data: {{translated_data}}. Remove HTML tags, clean whitespace, and extract structured claim objects (claim_text, author, source_url, publish_date).

steps.name: detect-misinformation
steps.prompt_template: Analyze {{normalized_data}} for misinformation. Use regex patterns for known Slovak/Czech disinformation keywords and cross-reference with the Google Fact Check API. Flag suspicious statements with a confidence score 0-100.

steps.name: enrich-with-context
steps.prompt_template: For each flagged statement in {{flagged_statements}}, search Wikidata and authoritative news archives to add context and verified entity information. Cross-reference with dennikn.sk fact-check archive.

steps.name: prepare-responses
steps.prompt_template: Based on the enriched context: {{enriched_graph}}, draft polite but factual corrections in both Slovak and English. Prepare as alerts for Slack and drafts for social media platforms.
